name: displaySeedBibleUrl
description: Display AO Seed Bible URLs according to user input (language, book, chapter, or verse).

bibleUrlData.description: the data users defines for his bibleUrl. there should always be one entry present here if user doesn't specifies anthing

language.description: the language user specifies. if not specified then use english.

bookId.description: Optional. get the book id by the book name user mentions. if not mentioned use GEN. available book ids are GEN, EXO, LEV, NUM, DEU, JOS, JDG, RUT, 1SA, 2SA, 1KI, 2KI, 1CH, 2CH, EZR, NEH, EST, JOB, PSA, PRO, ECC, SNG, ISA, JER, LAM, EZK, DAN, HOS, JOL, AMO, OBA, JON, MIC, NAM, HAB, ZEP, HAG, ZEC, MAL, MAT, MRK, LUK, JHN, ACT, ROM, 1CO, 2CO, GAL, EPH, PHP, COL, 1TH, 2TH, 1TI, 2TI, TIT, PHM, HEB, JAS, 1PE, 2PE, 1JN, 2JN, 3JN, JUD and REV

chapter.description: Optional. Chapter number. if not mentioned use 1

verse.description: Optional. Verse number. if not mentioned use 1

isCollaborative.description: if the user wants collaborative instance
